description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish and a modular design. It is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent scope mounted on the top rail for enhanced targeting. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip, and the barrel is fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle. The rifle also includes a pistol grip and a forward assist, with various attachment points visible along the body. Its overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban firearms.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, scope, suppressor, and detachable magazine, designed for modularity and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the collapsible stock, scope, ribbed handguard, suppressor, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, barrel opening, and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with slight differences in the visibility of the forward assist and ejection port.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the rear end of the scope, with the barrel and suppressor receding into the distance.
